title: Update README.md for v0.2.0 release
description: README needs updates for v0.2.0: new tool count (11), new client methods table, currency configuration docs, comparison section with @envia/envia-mcp, updated MCP tools/resources/prompts tables. Plan Phase 6b.

title: Schedule pickup tool: add country_code input parameter
description: The schedule-pickup MCP tool hardcodes country: 'MX' and phone_code: 'MX' when building the origin address. For multi-country support, add an optional country_code input field to the EnviaSchedulePickupInputSchema and pass it through to the origin address construction. Affects: src/tools/schedule-pickup.ts, src/types.ts
close_reason: Added origin_country param to pickup schema and tool

title: Submit envia-mcp to MCP server registry
description: Register envia-mcp at the official MCP server registry. The official @envia/envia-mcp is NOT registered yet — opportunity to be first. Plan Phase 6c.
